input_text: Harga barang basah kat supermarket jauh lebih mahal dari pasar pagi. Tapi pasar pagi cuma buka dua kali seminggu.
reason: Supermarket markup on fresh produce vs limited pasar pagi access.
suggested_rewrite: Pasar pagi yang lebih kerap boleh membantu mengurangkan kos makanan segar. PBT boleh meluluskan lebih banyak pasar pagi di kawasan kediaman.

input_text: Nak repair handphone screen pun RM300. Dulu RM50. Inflation gila tapi quality sama je.
reason: Phone screen repair price inflation from RM50 to RM300 with same quality.
suggested_rewrite: Bandingkan harga pembaikan di beberapa kedai sebelum bersetuju. Pertimbangkan insurans skrin telefon untuk perlindungan masa depan.

input_text: Every month Indah Water send estimated bill. Actual reading never done. How to trust the amount?
reason: Recurring estimated sewerage bills with no actual readings, trust issue.
suggested_rewrite: Request actual meter readings from Indah Water. If estimates are consistently inaccurate, file a formal complaint through their customer service.

input_text: 这个居民区的路边全是杂草。市政厅从来不来清理。看起来像荒地。
reason: Overgrown roadside weeds in residential area with no municipal cleanup.
suggested_rewrite: 道路两旁的杂草清理是市政厅的责任。拍照记录并向市政厅提交投诉。

input_text: Nak bukak akaun bank pun kena bawak macam-macam dokumen. Kalau kurang satu pun kena datang balik. Inefficient betul.
reason: Excessive documentation for bank account opening requiring multiple trips.
suggested_rewrite: Bank boleh menyenaraikan semua dokumen yang diperlukan secara jelas di laman web. Pengesahan digital boleh mengurangkan keperluan dokumen fizikal.

input_text: The kopitiam uncle increased my tea tarik price from RM1.80 to RM2.50 overnight. No warning, no reason given.
reason: Overnight 39% price increase on tea tarik with no explanation.
suggested_rewrite: Sudden price increases can be frustrating. Ask the vendor about the reason - it may be related to ingredient cost increases.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் தெரு நாய்கள் மிகவும் அதிகம். இரவில் நடப்பது ஆபத்து.
reason: Too many stray dogs making nighttime walking dangerous in the area.
suggested_rewrite: தெரு நாய் பிரச்சினையை உள்ளூர் நிர்வாகம் மற்றும் விலங்கு நல அமைப்புகள் மூலம் மனிதாபிமான முறையில் தீர்க்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Penyelenggaraan lif di flat kos rendah memang teruk. Setiap bulan ada breakdown. Orang tua terpaksa panjat tangga.
reason: Monthly lift breakdowns in low-cost flat forcing elderly to climb stairs.
suggested_rewrite: Lif di flat kos rendah memerlukan penyelenggaraan berkala. Aduan berulang kepada pengurusan dan PBT perlu didokumentasikan.

input_text: Government digital services crash every time new program launches. LHDN, MySejahtera before, now eKasih also cannot access.
reason: Government digital platforms repeatedly crashing during new program launches.
suggested_rewrite: Government digital platforms should be load-tested before launch. Phased rollouts by region or registration date can prevent system overload.

input_text: 小区里的路灯坏了好几个月了。晚上回家的路上什么都看不见。太不安全了。
reason: Street lights broken for months creating unsafe dark roads.
suggested_rewrite: 多月未修的路灯是安全隐患。向地方政府书面投诉并要求限期维修。

input_text: Tol plus highway punya hotline memang tak pernah berfungsi. Call 50 kali pun tak dapat cakap dengan orang.
reason: Highway operator hotline never reachable despite 50 calls.
suggested_rewrite: Jika talian aduan highway tidak berfungsi, aduan boleh dibuat melalui media sosial rasmi atau aplikasi highway berkenaan.

input_text: Landlord didn't return my deposit even after 3 months. Keep giving excuses. No proper rental law to protect tenants.
reason: Landlord withholding deposit for 3 months with excuses, no tenant protection law.
suggested_rewrite: Document all deposit communications. If the landlord refuses to return the deposit, consider filing a claim at the Small Claims Court for amounts up to RM5,000.

input_text: Bayar duit tuisyen anak tapi teacher MC selalu. Replacement teacher pun takde. Macam buang duit je.
reason: Tuition teacher frequently absent with no replacement despite fees paid.
suggested_rewrite: Pusat tuisyen perlu menyediakan pengganti apabila guru MC. Semak polisi pembatalan dan penggantian sebelum mendaftar.

input_text: 这些洗衣店经常把衣服弄坏但只肯赔偿一点点。消费者永远是吃亏的一方。
reason: Laundry services damaging clothes with minimal compensation.
suggested_rewrite: 洗衣店损坏衣物的赔偿问题可以向消费者法庭投诉。拍照留证并保留收据。

input_text: Jalan kampung dah jadi jalan tanah merah lepas hujan lebat. Semak dua tepi jalan pun takde siapa potong.
reason: Village road deteriorating to dirt after rain with overgrown sides uncut.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan jalan luar bandar perlu konsisten. Aduan kepada JKR dengan gambar membantu memprioritikan kerja pembaikan.

input_text: My condo management wants to increase maintenance fee by 30% but can't even explain what improvements will be made.
reason: 30% maintenance fee increase with no justification from management.
suggested_rewrite: Any maintenance fee increase should be justified with detailed improvement plans. Vote against unjustified increases at the AGM and request a financial audit.

input_text: Nak pergi interview kerja tapi bas lambat sejam. Sampai dah lewat, interviewer dah pergi. Peluang hilang sebab public transport.
reason: Missed job interview because bus was an hour late, lost opportunity.
suggested_rewrite: Kebolehpercayaan pengangkutan awam penting untuk akses pekerjaan. Merancang perjalanan lebih awal dan mempunyai alternatif boleh membantu situasi kritikal.

input_text: கடைகளில் விலை குறிப்பு சரியாக இல்லை. பில்லில் அதிக தொகை வருகிறது.
reason: Store price tags not matching bills, overcharging at checkout.
suggested_rewrite: விலை குறிப்பிற்கும் பில் தொகைக்கும் வேறுபாடு இருந்தால் KPDNHEP க்கு புகார் செய்யலாம். ஆதாரமாக புகைப்படம் எடுக்கவும்.

input_text: Anak aku tak dapat tempat kat tadika kerajaan. Terpaksa hantar tadika swasta mahal. Golongan B40 macam mana nak cope?
reason: Government kindergarten spots unavailable forcing expensive private option, B40 affordability.
suggested_rewrite: Kerajaan perlu menambah kapasiti tadika awam terutama di kawasan padat penduduk. Program subsidi untuk tadika swasta juga boleh membantu keluarga B40.

input_text: The pet grooming shop charged my friend RM200 for what should be a RM50 service. They see you're not local, they charge more.
reason: Pet grooming overcharging perceived non-local customers, price discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Always agree on service prices beforehand. If overcharged, request an itemized receipt and report to KPDNHEP if pricing seems discriminatory.

input_text: 每次交通事故理赔都要等很久。保险公司故意拖延希望你放弃索赔。
reason: Insurance companies deliberately delaying accident claims hoping claimants give up.
suggested_rewrite: 保险理赔延迟可以向银行Negara投诉。保留所有文件和通信记录作为证据。

input_text: Nak sewa premis niaga kat kawasan ni kena bayar goodwill RM50k. Bukan duit kecil. Orang muda mana ada modal macam tu.
reason: RM50k goodwill payment for business premises rental excluding young entrepreneurs.
suggested_rewrite: Kos goodwill yang tinggi menghalang usahawan muda. Program pinjaman mikro dan ruang perniagaan berkongsi boleh menjadi alternatif yang lebih mampu.

input_text: The drainage system in this new housing estate is terrible. After rain, water takes 3 days to subside. Design fault clearly.
reason: New housing estate with poor drainage taking 3 days to clear after rain.
suggested_rewrite: Poor drainage in new estates may violate building standards. Document the issue and raise it with the developer and local council's engineering department.

input_text: Pos Malaysia hantar parcel ke jiran salah rumah. Tapi orang tak nak pulangkan. Nak buat report pun susah. Nasib la.
reason: Postal service delivering to wrong address with neighbor keeping the parcel.
suggested_rewrite: Salah hantar parcel boleh dilaporkan kepada Pos Malaysia untuk siasatan. Minta nombor rujukan aduan dan susulan sehingga selesai.

input_text: 这些健身房签了一年合同就不让退。即使服务质量下降也不能退款。霸王条款。
reason: Gym refusing contract termination despite declining service quality, unfair terms.
suggested_rewrite: 不合理的合同条款可以向消费者法庭挑战。签约前仔细阅读条款并保留所有文件。

input_text: Rumah banglo mahal punya la tapi TNB still potong pokok sampai comot. Contractor diorang potong macam tak reti.
reason: TNB tree trimming damaging expensive bungalow landscaping carelessly.
suggested_rewrite: TNB wajib memberitahu pemilik rumah sebelum memotong pokok dan memastikan kerja dilakukan dengan kemas. Aduan boleh dibuat kepada TNB dengan bukti foto.

input_text: Public transport not disabled-friendly at all. No ramps, no lifts, no audio announcements. Disabled citizens invisible.
reason: Public transport completely lacking disability accessibility features.
suggested_rewrite: Public transport must comply with OKU accessibility standards. Organizations like the Malaysian Federation of the Deaf can advocate for better provisions.

input_text: Makanan frozen yang dijual kat kedai runcit ni kadang dah defrost dan freeze balik. Nampak ais kristal dalam packaging.
reason: Grocery store selling refrozen food products, food safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Produk frozen yang menunjukkan tanda defrost dan refreeze tidak selamat. Laporkan kepada KKM dan elakkan membeli produk yang menunjukkan kristal ais besar.

input_text: 每次去更新护照都要重新填写所有信息。上次的记录为什么不能保存？浪费时间。
reason: Passport renewal requiring complete re-entry of all information, no data retention.
suggested_rewrite: 护照更新系统应保留申请人的基本信息以简化流程。数字化记录管理可以显著提高效率。

input_text: Nak ambil anak dari daycare pun parking takde. Double park pun kena saman. Macam mana parents nak buat?
reason: No parking at daycare leading to double parking fines, parent Catch-22.
suggested_rewrite: Pusat jagaan kanak-kanak perlu menyediakan zon penurunan/pengambilan yang mencukupi. Ibu bapa boleh berbincang dengan pengendali untuk penyelesaian.

input_text: நான் வாங்கிய புதிய மின்விசிறி ஒரு வாரத்தில் வேலை செய்யவில்லை. கடை மாற்றித்தர மறுக்கிறது.
reason: New fan stopped working in a week, shop refusing replacement.
suggested_rewrite: புதிய பொருட்கள் உத்தரவாத காலத்தில் செயலிழந்தால் மாற்றுவது கடையின் கடமை. ரசீதுடன் நுகர்வோர் தீர்ப்பாயத்தில் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Lepas harga petrol naik, harga semua barang naik sekali. Tapi kalau petrol turun, harga barang tak turun pun. One way inflation.
reason: Asymmetric price inflation - everything goes up with petrol but never comes down.
suggested_rewrite: Kesan kenaikan harga minyak terhadap barangan asas perlu dipantau oleh KPDNHEP. Pemantauan harga yang lebih ketat semasa perubahan harga minyak diperlukan.

input_text: The street vendor food safety is questionable. Cooking in the open with flies everywhere. But enforcement only targets registered restaurants.
reason: Street vendor food safety concerns with enforcement gap compared to registered restaurants.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety standards should apply to all food sellers equally. Helping street vendors improve hygiene through training and affordable equipment is better than just enforcement.

input_text: 这个物业管理收了维修基金但从来不公布账目。业主的钱去哪了？
reason: Building management collecting sinking fund without disclosing accounts.
suggested_rewrite: 业主有权要求查看维修基金账目。在年度大会上提出审计要求并选举新的管理委员会。

input_text: Setiap kali beli kereta baru mesti ada hidden charges. Processing fee la, handling fee la. Padahal harga on the road dah include semua.
reason: Hidden fees added on top of advertised car on-the-road price.
suggested_rewrite: Semua kos kereta perlu dinyatakan dengan jelas sebelum pembelian. Bandingkan tawaran dari pelbagai pengedar dan minta pecahan kos bertulis.

input_text: Guard house kat kondominium ni hiasan je. Guard takde, gate terbuka 24 jam. Bayar security fee untuk apa?
reason: Condo guard house unmanned with gate always open despite security fees.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kondominium yang tidak mencukupi perlu dibangkitkan di AGM. Minta audit perkhidmatan keselamatan dan pertimbangkan penggantian vendor.

input_text: New housing area but no bus route passes through. Everyone needs a car. What happened to sustainable planning?
reason: New development without public transport access forcing car dependency.
suggested_rewrite: Urban development should include public transport connectivity from the planning stage. Petition the transport authority for bus route extensions to new areas.

input_text: 每次去理发店都被推销各种护发产品。不买的话理发师态度就变差。
reason: Barbershop aggressive upselling with attitude change if products declined.
suggested_rewrite: 消费者有权拒绝不需要的产品推销。如果服务态度因此变差，可以选择其他理发店。

input_text: Surat kelulusan pinjaman bank ambil 2 bulan. Lepas tu interest rate dah berubah. System banking Malaysia memang slow.
reason: 2-month loan approval causing interest rate changes, banking system speed.
suggested_rewrite: Proses kelulusan pinjaman boleh dipercepatkan dengan pendigitalan. Minta bank mengunci kadar faedah semasa tempoh kelulusan.

input_text: Anak perempuan aku kena catcall kat bus stop setiap hari. Umur baru 15 tahun. Polis cakap tak boleh buat apa sebab verbal je.
reason: 15-year-old girl catcalled daily at bus stop with police saying they can't act on verbal harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan seksual lisan terhadap kanak-kanak adalah jenayah. Buat laporan bertulis kepada polis dan Women's Aid Organisation (WAO) untuk sokongan.

input_text: This factory emitting thick black smoke every night after inspection hours. Clearly hiding their pollution from inspectors.
reason: Factory timing pollution for after inspection hours, deliberate environmental violation.
suggested_rewrite: Document night emissions with photos, timestamps, and video. Report to DOE and request unannounced nighttime inspections of the facility.

input_text: 停车场出口的收费机经常出错。多收了钱投诉也没人处理。
reason: Parking exit machine overcharging with no complaint resolution.
suggested_rewrite: 保留停车票据和付款记录。如遇多收费，向停车场管理处要求退款并向消费者法庭投诉。

input_text: Sewa gerai kat pasar tani pun dah RM800 sebulan. Lepas kos bahan, untung tinggal sikit je. Peniaga kecil memang susah.
reason: Farmers market stall rent at RM800/month leaving little profit for small traders.
suggested_rewrite: Kos sewa gerai yang tinggi di pasar tani membebankan peniaga kecil. PBT boleh mempertimbangkan kadar sewa yang berpatutan untuk menyokong PKS.

input_text: Tamil school students still studying in dilapidated buildings. Ceiling collapsed last week. When will someone take action?
reason: Tamil school structural safety crisis with ceiling collapse, delayed action.
suggested_rewrite: Student safety is paramount. Schools with structural failures should be immediately assessed and temporary facilities provided while repairs are done.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தில் சாலை விபத்துகள் அதிகரித்து வருகின்றன. ஆனால் பாதுகாப்பு நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படவில்லை.
reason: Rising road accidents in the city with no safety measures being taken.
suggested_rewrite: சாலை பாதுகாப்பு மேம்படுத்த வேக கட்டுப்பாட்டு கருவிகள், தெளிவான சாலை குறிகள் மற்றும் போக்குவரத்து கல்வி தேவை.
